questions.q: SWIFT stands for?
questions.q_hi: SWIFT का पूर्ण रूप क्या है?

System for World Interbank Finance Transfer
Society for World Internet Finance Transfer

questions.q: In banking, what does the term 'BASE RATE' refer to?
questions.q_hi: बैंकिंग में, 'बेस रेट' शब्द किसे संदर्भित करता है?
opts: The rate at which RBI lends to commercial banks
The minimum lending rate below which banks cannot lend
The rate of interest on savings accounts
The rate at which banks borrow from each other

questions.q: Under updated RBI norms, what is the asset threshold below which a Type I NBFC (with no public funds and no customer interface) is exempt from registration?

questions.q: As per RBI's Utkarsh 2029 strategy, which project is dedicated to modernizing currency management?

questions.q: Under revised RBI norms, what is the maximum individual unsecured loan limit for Tier-1 Urban Cooperative Banks (UCBs)?

questions.q: What is India's rank in the global pollution rankings 2025 according to IQAir report?

questions.q: Which agency was assigned the role of PARRV (Passive Risk and Return Verification) under the SEBI framework?

questions.q: As per RBI's revised guidelines effective from 2026, what is the cooling-off period for directors upon completion of a continuous tenure of ten years on the board of UCBs and RCBs?

questions.q: Which of the following is the colour of light with the shortest wavelength?
questions.q_hi: सबसे छोटी तरंग दैर्ध्य वाले प्रकाश का रंग निम्नलिखित में से कौन सा है?
